title: Divide Kanban visualizations by People
excerpt:
I want to be able to divide a Kanban board by person. Currently, the divide by feature only allows users to divide a Kanban by group, status, or priority. 
 
Dividing by person will allow each person to have their own Ka…

posts.author: emount (Evan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to be able to divide a Kanban board by person. Currently, the divide by feature only allows users to divide a Kanban by group, status, or priority.

Dividing by person will allow each person to have their own Kanban swim lane and easily see all of their cards.

I know you can filter the Kanban board by person, but dividing by person also allows a supervisor to quickly see the status of each person’s tasks without having to create a filter for each person.

posts.author: cgrazio (Christine Grazio)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a view we’d love to have as well - a kanban view by person is a great tool in a daily stand-up or other project status meeting where each person can review what’s in their bucket by going through the cards. This feature is top on my wish list!

posts.author: Julia1 (Julia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

There is an app Kanbanify that makes it possible to have a board in a kanban view groupping items by people. You can connect 1 or multiple boards in the Kanban view. You can also connect subitems.

You can group items in the Kanban view by people, status or Priority

Hope that helps.

Regards

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Multi Board Kanban now supports grouping by people

A popular way that customers use our app is to split horizontally by status and vertically by person. This way each individual kind of has their own Kanban board which they can focus on during a check in meeting.

image1636×822 115 KB

posts.author: Vargiya (Pvargiya)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, is this available in enterprise plan? I don’s see this option in my board to divide by people

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Vargiya - This is a marketplace addon that you have to purchase separately. You can find all details about the addon here - Multi Board Kanban - monday.com Marketplace

Happy to answer any questions 1:1 as well - Calendly
